problem.title: Length of Last Word
problem.description: Given a string s consisting of words and spaces, return the length of the last word in the string.
assumptions: A word is a maximal substring with no spaces.
At least one word in the string.

example.explanation: Last word is 'World' with length 5. Trim trailing spaces first.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – String Traversal
solutions.description: Scan the string from right to left, first skipping any trailing spaces, then counting characters until another space or the start of the string is reached. This single-pass approach runs in O(n) time and uses O(1) space without needing to split the string.
